questions.question_text_full: A solid cube of side 8 cm is dropped into a rectangular container of length 16 cm, breadth 8 cm and height 15 cm which is partly filled with water. If the cube is completely submerged, then the rise of water level (in cm) is:
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full: The number of cars passing the road near a colony from 6 am to 12 noon has been shown in the following histogram. What is the ratio of the number of cars passed between 6 am and 8 am to the number of cars passed between 9 am and 11 am?
questions.notes: Only one option is visible on the page.
